surfaces_and_spacing.cards: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-none border border-[#D8D4CC] p-8 md:p-12 shadow-sm transition-all hover:border-[#4A6B53] hover:-translate-y-1

buttons.primary: bg-[#9C462C] hover:bg-[#7A3622] text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1B3B22] text-[#1B3B22] hover:bg-[#1B3B22] hover:text-[#F8F7F4] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-colors

forms.input: bg-[#FFFFFF] border-[#D8D4CC] text-[#1A221C] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#9C462C]/20 focus:border-[#9C462C] rounded-none p-4
forms.label: text-sm font-semibold text-[#1A221C] mb-2 block

hero_startseite.description: Modern building surrounded by towering redwood trees
hero_startseite.usage: Hero section background on Startseite. Must use a bg-[#F8F7F4]/40 overlay to ensure text contrast.

unternehmen_office.description: Modern buildings integrated with lush green plants
unternehmen_office.usage: Image for 'Über uns' or 'Unternehmen' page showing sustainable architecture

markus_engemann_ceo.usage: Portrait of Geschäftsführer Markus Engemann on the Unternehmen page

leistungen_natur.description: Macro shot of lush green moss and plants
leistungen_natur.usage: Decorative element for the 'Leistungen' section to emphasize ecological focus

karriere_hero.description: Sunlight filtering through tall pine trees and moss
karriere_hero.usage: Background or side panel for the '/registrierung/angestellte' form or 'Karriere' hero

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Integrate Outfit and Work Sans via standard imports or Google Fonts.
NO PURPLE/VIOLET Gradients. Adhere strictly to the defined earthy color palette (Waldgrün, Moos, Terracotta, Creme).
The Startseite must include Hero, Leistungs-Teaser, USPs, Kennzahlen, and CTA sections.
Required routes/pages: Startseite (/), Unternehmen (/unternehmen), Leistungen (/leistungen), Karriere (/karriere), Kontakt (/kontakt), Impressum (/impressum), Datenschutz (/datenschutz).
Create the specific route '/registrierung/angestellte' featuring a comprehensive, premium-styled application form.
The employee registration form must capture applicant details and simulate sending data to a Telegram Bot using backend logic. Read the Telegram Bot token from .env variables.
Footer must contain Impressum and Datenschutz links, along with company address (ecoprotec GmbH, Pamplonastraße 19, 33106 Paderborn, HRB 3625).
All interactive elements (buttons, links, form fields) must include a descriptive 'data-testid' attribute (e.g. data-testid='apply-submit-btn').
Implement 'The Bento Grid Protocol' for displaying services (Leistungen). Ensure generous internal padding (p-8 or p-12) for cards.
Header navigation must be sticky with the defined 'Crystal Glass' effect to remain visible but elegant.
